# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Write secure code.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 50
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true

  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service:8000
    routes:
      - name: payment-route
        paths:
          - /payments
        methods:
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 30
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      credentials: true
